## Eliminate hiring inefficiencies and focus on strategic decision-making with structured video interviews

![]()

Easy and flexible scheduling

### Easy and flexible scheduling

Improve time-to-hire with quick and effortless scheduling options.

![]()

Structured interviews

### Structured interviews

Structure interviews around weighted competencies mapped to job roles.

![]()

Data-backed hiring decisions

### Data-backed hiring decisions

Make accurate hiring decisions based on comprehensive and insightful reports

* * *

## Empower applicant creativity and assess skills in real-time with collaborative tools

Live coding environment

Live coding environment

Conduct seamless pair-programming interviews

* Write and edit code in a modern editor supporting 70+ languages
 
* Assess candidates' technical skills and problem-solving abilities in a live setting
 
* Engage in synchronous dialogue with candidates to understand their thought process
 
* Tailor coding tasks to your organization's specific needs and requirements
 

![]()

coding-editor

* * *

Interactive whiteboard and diagramming tool

Conduct Interviews Remotely, Simulate Real-Life Business & Coding Challenges

Brainstorm, discuss, and visualize complex ideas

* Utilize a range of tools to generate diagrams and flowcharts
 
* Take advantage of the power of visual aid in tech and non-tech interviews
 
* Assess candidates’ abilities to articulate ideas and convey complex concepts
 
* Evaluate capacity for original thinking and inventive problem-solving
 

![]()

whiteboard

## Transforming interview experiences with integrity and engagement

![]()

Multi-panel interviews

### Multi-panel interviews

Hassle-free interview set up with seamless customization and scheduling

![]()

Superior candidate experience

### Superior candidate experience

Immersive platform to engage candidates with a host of intuitive features

![]()

Reduced interview bias

### Reduced interview bias

Standardized and objective evaluation to enable efficient grading

![]()

Secure and cheat-proof

### Secure and cheat-proof

Highly secure interview platform with superior proctoring prowess

![]()

Auditable reports

### Auditable reports

Insightful reports to enable data-driven talent decisions

![]()

Optimized costs

### Optimized costs

Major savings on hiring costs and time, resulting in increased hiring efficiency

* * *
